description: A gentle mechanical polar bear quietly fishing from a floating ice floe with its stool, rod, bucket, scarf, and winter calm intact.

idle.notes: Calm seated fishing idle with tiny breathing and line sway.

walk.notes: Directional scene-glide rows used for drag-facing and motion semantics; Floe remains seated and fishing rather than literally walking.

curious.notes: Gentle curious reaction to a small movement in the line or ice hole while staying seated.

happy.notes: Soft contented smile and tiny scarf sway, mapped onto the fixed waving row.

sleep.notes: Seated winter doze with lowered head and closed eyes while keeping rod, floe, and bucket stable.

active.notes: Support loop with a slightly more attentive line-check motion.

hop.notes: Support loop interpreted as a tiny buoyant bob of the whole floe scene, not a literal jump.

melancholy.notes: Soft no-catch slump that preserves the calm healing tone.

walk_right.notes: Scene glides right while Floe stays seated and keeps the fishing composition intact.

walk_left.notes: Scene glides left while Floe stays seated and keeps the fishing composition intact.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing scene-glide rows rather than a literal walk cycle.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing seated fishing row
right drag uses the true right-facing seated fishing row
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
the bear, floe, stool, rod, line, ice hole, and bucket remain coordinated in both directions
Floe stays readable at small size as a seated mechanical polar bear fishing on a floating ice floe

baseSceneIdentity.subject: white mechanical polar bear
signatureWear: orange-red and cream striped knit hat
baseSceneIdentity.mood: gentle, quiet, patient, winter healing companion
